audience: French-speaking adults (FR, BE, QC), café culture, chic and elegant aesthetic

sphere.concept: tiny 3D cream-and-gold fleur-de-lis pastry charm, not a ball, not a geometric shape
sphere.styleNotes: French chic glossy patisserie style, pale cream with gold edges, transparent background, high contrast against deep navy bg

trump.concept: buttery flaky French croissant on its own, fresh from the oven
trump.styleNotes: 3D rendered pastry, golden buttery crust, soft daylight, high contrast against deep navy / cobble bg

money.concept: tiny espresso cup on a saucer with a perfect crema and a sugar cube on the side
money.styleNotes: 3D rendered porcelain, glossy crema, warm cafe lighting, high contrast against deep navy bg

poop.concept: stack of three pastel macarons in pink, mint, and lemon
poop.styleNotes: 3D rendered patisserie, soft pastel shells, delicate filling, high contrast against deep navy bg

cube.concept: single slice of fresh French baguette with golden crust and butter
cube.styleNotes: 3D food render, isolated centered, transparent background

triangle.concept: miniature 3D Eiffel Tower in polished bronze metallic finish
triangle.styleNotes: isolated centered, French chic, transparent background

background.concept: top-down view of a Parisian café terrace cobblestone floor with a faint shadow of a striped awning and a few fallen leaves
background.styleNotes: warm painterly, cream and bordeaux palette, soft afternoon light
